text.message: lol it’s blue asking for a 2:1

it is necessary cuz I am very behind

black had to take the 84 wood
I feel like black taking 8 4 just opens me up even more
and the idea is to work together so I take the center instead of orange
Ohhh right so black basically plays the game in order to serve you and doesn’t try to help himself at all
lback had to take the wood port
that was the balancing in the game
not sure what you mean blue, I wanted sheep tbh
you still dont see it? black had to take wood port, the 910, balancing the game
tbh Im not good at this game I play for fun
I think i know what you mean tho
Also, I think blue is seriously exaggerating how unbalanced the board is
very unbalanced, just crazy dice that hit many strange numbers in the beginning
No blue, the dice were not crazy. They were randomized. You just have been complaining for the sake of it
haha no, ometimes I forget I have to explain these things
even after OJ connects and get 7 plus his 2 vps?
I’m just connecting so you don’t take road
go for it, I dont make road material any way
and no space to compete with you
So one of yall should take army
im gonna build 6 roads on my turn and win guys
Well from where I’m standing it seems like you’re at 8
im glad at least red isnt falling for your table talk
cant say the same about blue
And he might wanna keep red at 8
